home.summary: I build internal software, landing pages, mobile apps, and data-heavy operational tools for real business workflows.
home.calloutTitle: Most of my work lives in private products.
home.calloutBody: This portfolio focuses on what I built, the workflows I improved, and the kind of systems I can own end to end.

about.title: Stack built for real business systems.
about.intro: APIs, data models, integrations, realtime flows, operational logic and web or mobile layer needed to ship the product.

backend.title: Backend first
backend.body: I am strongest in APIs, business logic, data modeling, integrations, and the deployment path around them.

business.title: Built for operational complexity
business.body: Most of my work supports payroll, finance, inventory, ticketing, reporting, and internal collaboration.

tools.title: Practical stack, end-to-end ownership
tools.body: Node, SQL and NoSQL storage, realtime services, mobile and frontend layers to deliver a usable product.

backend.title: Backend core
backend.description: The services, data stores, integrations, and realtime layers I rely on most.

delivery.title: Delivery and operations
delivery.description: Version control, containers, tooling, and hosting that keep projects stable and shippable.

mobile.title: Mobile development
mobile.description: Tools I use for scanner-based apps, native work, and mobile companions for internal platforms.

frontend.title: Frontend support
frontend.description: UI Tools I use to deliver dashboards, admin flows, or client-facing screens when the product needs them.

contact.title: Full-stack development.
contact.description: Software for real business operations, internal tools, dashboards, inventory flows, mobile apps, and full-stack systems.
contact.privateBody: Private company products, reporting flows, inventory operations, realtime features, and end-to-end delivery from backend logic to usable interfaces.
